## Key Takeaways

- Soloscaler doesn't fit an existing category — it sits at the intersection of high strategy and high execution at SMB economics
- Five competitor types analyzed: freelancers, agencies, SaaS tools, consultants, business coaches
- The 2x2 positioning map (strategic value vs. execution capability) is the clearest visual of the brand's unique position
- Every competitive comparison ends with a ready-to-use one-liner for sales and content
- Objection handling scripts address the four most common buyer pushbacks

- [[20260314-positioning-map-quadrant]] — The 2x2 map showing Soloscaler's unique position
- [[20260314-anti-dependency-model]] — Why building client self-sufficiency is the competitive moat
